'''Carbinol''' was the [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] of [[House Carbinol]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] who met with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda]] and [[Irek Ismaren]] about the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. She had an athletic build, and, despite pledging her support, did not trust Ismaren.

{{Char-stub}}
